provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship officer wearing a steel-blue Compact uniform that is almost correct but slightly too stylish — the jacket is fitted in a way that suggests a fashion designer not a military tailor, the collar is fashionably popped rather than regulation-stiff, the trousers have a slight flare, the boots have a small heel, the overall silhouette says contemporary fashion editorial not institutional military, everything is individually correct but the assembly feels designed not issued
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Almost on-style but fails in a subtle way that teaches nuance. See subject ID for specific issue.
